message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint: Damaged and Late Delivery – Order #[Order Number]

Dear [Customer Service Name or "Customer Support Team"],

I am writing to formally express my dissatisfaction regarding the status of my recent order, #[Order Number], which was placed on [Date of Purchase].

According to the shipping confirmation provided, the estimated delivery date was [Original Estimated Delivery Date]. However, the package did not arrive until [Actual Delivery Date], resulting in a delay of two weeks. This significant delay has caused considerable inconvenience, as the items were intended for [mention specific purpose, e.g., a gift, a work deadline, or a specific event], which has now been compromised.

Furthermore, upon receiving the package, I discovered that the contents were severely damaged. Specifically, [describe the damage in detail, e.g., the box was crushed, the item inside was cracked, or the packaging was torn open]. I have attached photographs documenting both the condition of the external packaging and the damage to the items themselves for your reference.

Given these issues, I request a full refund of the purchase price, including any shipping costs incurred. Alternatively, if a replacement is possible, I would prefer a refund due to the urgency of the matter and the lack of trust in the current shipping process.

I have attached the following documents to support my claim:
1. A copy of the original order confirmation.
2. Photos of the damaged package and items.
3. The shipping label and tracking information.

I expect a response regarding this matter within [e.g., 5 business days]. I hope to resolve this issue amicably and promptly. However, if I do not receive a satisfactory resolution, I will be forced to escalate this matter by filing a dispute with my credit card provider and reporting the incident to relevant consumer protection agencies.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this serious matter.
